description: The TimeSineDriver component outputs a value over time that matches a Sine Wave of the provided values.

fields.Target: The field to drive with a constantly changing Sine wave.
fields.Speed: The frequency/speed of the Sine Wave waves.
fields.Min: The minimum value to drive ``Target`` to.
fields.Max: The maximum value to drive ``Target`` to.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a ``Target`` for it to start working.
